items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when blocking an emergency slot, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific checks or data that demonstrate the system's behavior in this scenario. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether the requirement is satisfied.
